evals.prompt: Given low FPS in Isaac Sim, perform a no-profiling triage plan.
evals.expected_output: Provides read-only GPU/CPU/memory/runtime triage and classifies likely bottleneck with confidence.
assertions: Does not apply fixes or mutate governor/persistence mode
Explains that idle host metrics are not workload conclusions
Hands off fixes to perf-tuning and traces to profiling/nsys-analyze

evals.prompt: nvidia-smi shows an idle GPU and no Isaac process is running. What bottleneck is this?
evals.expected_output: Explains that no workload-specific bottleneck can be inferred yet and asks/runs runtime capture when workload exists.
assertions: Does not classify idle GPU as proof of a performance issue
Requests or waits for workload runtime metrics
